topic: Instance Types for Amazon Neptune

  entities:

    Amazon Neptune|Service
    Neptune pricing page|Creative Work

  proposition: [Amazon Neptune is a graph database service.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Amazon Neptune|TYPE|graph database service

  proposition: [Amazon Neptune offers a number of different instance sizes and families.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Amazon Neptune|HAS_FEATURE|different instance sizes and families

  proposition: [Amazon Neptune's different instance sizes and families offer different capabilities suited to different graph workloads.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Amazon Neptune|HAS_CAPABILITY|different capabilities suited to different graph workloads

  proposition: [The Neptune pricing page is located at https://aws.amazon.com/neptune/pricing/.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune pricing page|URL|https://aws.amazon.com/neptune/pricing/

  proposition: [The Neptune pricing page provides pricing for each instance type in Amazon Neptune's instance families.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Neptune pricing page|PROVIDES_INFO_ON|Amazon Neptune

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune pricing page|HAS_CONTENT|pricing for each instance type in Amazon Neptune's instance families
